Hero.title: Never Expose Your Phone Number When Parking Again
Hero.description: MoveCar provides a smart QR code for your dashboard. Anyone can scan it to notify you instantly via native push alerts. Protect your privacy and stop random calls.

Features.title: Why Choose MoveCar?
Features.description: The modern, privacy-first alternative to leaving your phone number on the dashboard.

items.title: 100% Privacy Protection
items.description: Never write your personal phone number on a piece of paper again. Your number remains completely hidden from strangers.

items.title: No App Required for Scanners
items.description: Anyone with a smartphone can scan your QR code. It opens directly in their browser—no app download required.

items.title: Instant Native Alerts
items.description: Receive immediate push notifications on your phone via Bark, FCM, Telegram, or Email when someone needs you to move your car.

items.title: Location Tracking
items.description: The scanner's precise location is automatically attached to the alert, so you know exactly where to go.

UseCases.title: As Simple As Scan & Go
UseCases.description: Get set up in less than 2 minutes and enjoy lifetime privacy.

cases.title: 1. Get Your QR Code
cases.description: Sign up and download your unique, beautifully designed QR code in PDF format.

cases.title: 2. Print & Place
cases.description: Print it out and place it on your dashboard, or order our premium physical sticker.

cases.title: 3. Stay Protected
cases.description: Connect your preferred push channel (Bark, FCM, Telegram, or Email) to receive instant alerts whenever someone scans your code.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Drivers Worldwide
Testimonials.description: Join thousands of drivers who have taken back their privacy.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about MoveCar.

items.question: Does the person scanning my car need to download an app?
items.answer: No! This is our biggest advantage. They simply scan the QR code with their regular camera app, and it opens a fast, secure web page where they can notify you instantly.

items.question: How will I receive the notification?
items.answer: As the car owner, you connect one or more push channels in your dashboard: Bark, FCM (Android/Web), Telegram, or Email. You will receive a high-priority push notification immediately.

items.question: Is it really a one-time payment?
items.answer: Yes! If you choose the Lifetime plan ($29), you will never be charged again. You get lifetime access to unlimited QR codes and unlimited push notifications.

items.question: Can I use it for multiple cars?
items.answer: Free plan covers 1 vehicle. Pro Monthly/Yearly covers up to 10 vehicles. Lifetime plan gives you unlimited QR codes under one account.

CTA.title: Protect Your Privacy Today
CTA.description: Start with MoveCar today: Pro is $4.9/month, $49/year, or $29 for Lifetime.
CTA.trustText: One-time payment. Lifetime peace of mind.
